idea-plugin.name: Breeze Dev Helper
idea-plugin.description:
Spec Dev Toolkit for IntelliJ IDEA

Breeze Dev Helper is an IDEA plugin for Spec Dev workflows. It organizes capabilities by functional areas so that specifications, documentation, and code can stay connected during development.

1. Document Enhancement

The current release focuses on document-to-code navigation in Markdown via breeze-jump:// links.

Supported formats:

  • breeze-jump://com.path.to.ClassName
  • breeze-jump://com.path.to.ClassName#methodName
  • breeze-jump://com.path.to.ClassName#fieldName
  • breeze-jump://com.path.to.ClassName:123
  • breeze-jump://com.path.to.ClassName#methodName:123
  • breeze-jump://com.path.to.ClassName#fieldName:123

Navigation currently supports Java, Kotlin, and Scala symbols including classes, methods, fields, constants, enum members, and line-based navigation.

2. Spec Jump - Code to Document Navigation

Jump from @spec annotations in code comments to corresponding markdown specification documents.

Supported formats:

  • @spec docs/specs/xxx-spec.md

Usage: Place @spec docs/specs/xxx-spec.md in Java, Scala, or Kotlin comments, then use Ctrl/Cmd+B or Ctrl/Cmd+Click to navigate to the spec file.

3. Capability Layout

Document enhancement is only one part of the plugin. Breeze Dev Helper is designed as a larger Spec Dev assistant and will continue to grow by capability modules.
